## Description
Please describe the changes you've made.

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

## Security Invariants Checklist
- [ ] I have reviewed the [SDK Security Invariants](docs/SDK_SECURITY_INVARIANTS.md).
- [ ] **Crucial**: This change does NOT allow banner components to fetch or render interstitial ads (preventing payout fraud).
- [ ] All sensitive keys are handled via environment variables/secrets.

## Testing
- [ ] I have tested these changes on the relevant platforms (Web, Android, iOS, etc.)
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated.
